attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 FID
,REF_CODE
,BID
,OPERATION_UNIT
,INSTANCE_NAME
,BDOM
,CURRENCY
,ORG_ID
,LEDGER_ID
,APPLICATION_NAME
,SOURCE
,KAFKA_TOPIC_NAME
,SUBSCRIPTION_CODE
,SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE
,WEB_ORDER_ID
,SOURCE_ORDER_LINE_ID
,BILLING_MODEL
,OFFER_TYPE
,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
,ITEM_NAME
,QUANTITY
,ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
,TRX_NUMBER
,CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
,CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
,CHARGE_TYPE
,AMOUNT
,DEAL_ID
,RULE_START_DATE
,RULE_END_DATE
,ORIGINAL_UNIQUE_ID
,SK_LINE_REF_NUM       /*FLEXI SCOPE*/
,SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT    /*FLEXI SCOPE*/
,OA_FLAG
,SEQUENCE_ID
,GL_DATE
,DEBIT_AMOUNT
,CREDIT_AMOUNT
,DEBIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT
,CREDIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT
,GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE
,GL_TRANSFER_DATE
,DEBIT_CCID
,CREDIT_CCID
,ACCOUNT_CLASS
,FISCAL_PERIOD_NUMBER
,OA_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
,OA_ATTRIB_ID
,OA_ITEM_NAME
,OA_QUANTITY
,OA_PERCENTAGE
,OA_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
,OA_CHARGE_TYPE
,OA_RULE_START_DATE
,OA_RULE_END_DATE
,OA_ORIGINAL_UNIQUE_ID
,OA_UNIQUE_ID
,OA_SEQUENCE_ID
,DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE
,FUTURE_BILLING_PROCESS_FLG
,TRXN_SOURCE
,LINE_REF_NUMBER
,ORIG_LINE_REF_NUMBER
,OA_LINE_REF_NUMBER
,OA_ORIG_LINE_REF_NUMBER
,ORDER_NUMBER
,PARTNER_HARDWARE_REV_FLG /*ADDED AS PART OF ATHENA Q2FY21*/  
, TIME_BOUND_CREDIT /* Added for PA credit Q2FY21 DEC*/
, FLEXUP_FLAG /*Added as part of Q1FY22 Athena Sep release */
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG_ACCRUAL_DIST_ALL

SELECT
 EL_OUT.FID,
 EL_OUT.REF_CODE, 
 EL_OUT.BID, 
 EL_OUT.OPERATION_UNIT, 
 EL_OUT.INSTANCE_NAME, 
 EL_OUT.BDOM, 
 EL_OUT.CURRENCY,
 EL_OUT.ORG_ID,
 EL_OUT.LEDGER_ID, 
 EL_OUT.APPLICATION_NAME, 
 EL_OUT.SOURCE, 
 EL_OUT.KAFKA_TOPIC_NAME, 
 EL_OUT.SUBSCRIPTION_CODE,
 EL_OUT.SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE, 
 EL_OUT.WEB_ORDER_ID, 
 EL_OUT.SOURCE_ORDER_LINE_ID,
 EL_OUT.BILLING_MODEL, 
 EL_OUT.OFFER_TYPE, 
 EL_OUT.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, 
 EL_OUT.ITEM_NAME, QUANTITY,
 EL_OUT.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
 EL_OUT.TRX_NUMBER, 
 COALESCE(EL_OUT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,-9999), 
 COALESCE(EL_OUT.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,-9999),
 EL_OUT.CHARGE_TYPE, 
 EL_OUT.AMOUNT, 
 EL_OUT.DEAL_ID, 
 EL_OUT.RULE_START_DATE, 
 EL_OUT.RULE_END_DATE,
 EL_OUT.ORIGINAL_UNIQUE_ID, 
 CASE WHEN EL_OUT.TRXN_SOURCE<>'Accruals_OM' THEN  EL_OUT.UNIQUE_ID ELSE -999 END AS SK_LINE_REF_NUM,    /*FLEXI SCOPE*/
 CASE WHEN EL_OUT.TRXN_SOURCE='Accruals_OM' THEN  EL_OUT.UNIQUE_ID ELSE -999 END AS SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,   /*FLEXI SCOPE*/
 EL_OUT.OA_FLAG, 
 EL_OUT.SEQUENCE_ID, 
 EL_OUT.GL_DATE,
 EL_OUT.DEBIT_AMOUNT,
 EL_OUT.CREDIT_AMOUNT, 
 EL_OUT.DEBIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT, 
 EL_OUT.CREDIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT,
 EL_OUT.GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE,
 EL_OUT.GL_TRANSFER_DATE,
 EL_OUT.DEBIT_CCID,
 EL_OUT.CREDIT_CCID,
 EL_OUT.DEBIT_ACCOUNT_CLASS, 
 EL_OUT.CREDIT_ACCOUNT_CLASS, 
 EL_OUT.FISCAL_PERIOD_NUMBER,
 EL_OUT.OA_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, 
 EL_OUT.OA_ATTRIB_ID,
 EL_OUT.OA_ITEM_NAME, 
 EL_OUT.OA_QUANTITY,
 EL_OUT.OA_PERCENTAGE, 
 EL_OUT.OA_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, 
 EL_OUT.OA_CHARGE_TYPE, 
 EL_OUT.OA_RULE_START_DATE,
 EL_OUT.OA_RULE_END_DATE, 
 EL_OUT.OA_ORIGINAL_UNIQUE_ID, 
 EL_OUT.OA_UNIQUE_ID,
 EL_OUT.OA_SEQUENCE_ID,
 EL_OUT.FUTURE_BILLING_PROCESS_FLG,
 EL_OUT.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
 EL_OUT.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
 EL_OUT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
 EL_OUT.EDW_UPDATE_USER 
 ,EL_OUT.TRXN_SOURCE 
 ,EL_OUT.LINE_REF_NUMBER 
 ,EL_OUT.ORIG_LINE_REF_NUMBER 
 ,EL_OUT.OA_LINE_REF_NUMBER 
 ,EL_OUT.OA_ORIG_LINE_REF_NUMBER 
 ,EL_OUT.ORDER_NUMBER
 ,EL_OUT.PARTNER_HARDWARE_REV_FLG /*ADDED AS PART OF ATHENA Q2FY21*/ 
 ,EL_OUT.TIME_BOUND_CREDIT /* Added for PA credit Q2FY21 DEC*/
 ,EL_OUT.FLEXUP_FLAG /*Added as part of Athena Sep release Q1FY22*/
 FROM
 (SELECT * FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXCFIR_REV_ACRL EL
  WHERE EL.EDW_UPDATE_DTM >(SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES WHERE
  JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_WI_CG_ACCRUAL_DIST_ALL' AND TABLE_NAME='EL_CG1_XXCFIR_REV_ACRL')
   QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY EL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID ,EL.UNIQUE_ID ,
 EL.GL_DATE ,EL.DEBIT_CCID ,EL.CREDIT_CCID ,EL.OA_ATTRIB_ID,EL.DEBIT_ACCOUNT_CLASS,EL.CREDIT_ACCOUNT_CLASS,EL.SEQUENCE_ID,EL.TRXN_SOURCE
   ORDER BY EDW_CREATE_DTM DESC)=1
  ) EL_OUT

SELECT 
   FID
  ,REF_CODE
  ,BID
  ,OPERATION_UNIT
  ,INSTANCE_NAME
  ,BDOM
  ,CURRENCY
  ,ORG_ID
  ,LEDGER_ID
  ,APPLICATION_NAME
  ,SOURCE
  ,KAFKA_TOPIC_NAME
  ,SUBSCRIPTION_CODE
  ,SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE
  ,WEB_ORDER_ID
  ,SOURCE_ORDER_LINE_ID
  ,BILLING_MODEL
  ,OFFER_TYPE
  ,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
  ,ITEM_NAME
  ,QUANTITY
   ,ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
  ,TRX_NUMBER
  ,CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
  ,CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
  ,CHARGE_TYPE
  ,AMOUNT
  ,DEAL_ID
  ,RULE_START_DATE
  ,RULE_END_DATE
  ,ORIGINAL_UNIQUE_ID
  ,SK_LINE_REF_NUM       /*FLEXI SCOPE*/
  ,SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT    /*FLEXI SCOPE*/
  ,OA_FLAG
  ,SEQUENCE_ID
  ,GL_DATE
 ,DEBIT_AMOUNT
 ,CAST(NULL AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS CREDIT_AMOUNT
 ,DEBIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT
 ,CAST(NULL AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS CREDIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT
 ,GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE
 ,GL_TRANSFER_DATE
 ,DEBIT_CCID AS DEBIT_CCID
 ,CREDIT_CCID AS CREDIT_CCID
 ,DEBIT_ACCOUNT_CLASS AS ACCOUNT_CLASS
 ,FISCAL_PERIOD_NUMBER
 ,OA_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
 ,OA_ATTRIB_ID
 ,OA_ITEM_NAME
 ,OA_QUANTITY
 ,OA_PERCENTAGE
 ,OA_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
 ,OA_CHARGE_TYPE
 ,OA_RULE_START_DATE
 ,OA_RULE_END_DATE
 ,OA_ORIGINAL_UNIQUE_ID
 ,OA_UNIQUE_ID
 ,OA_SEQUENCE_ID
 ,CAST('DEBIT' AS VARCHAR(7)) AS DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE
 ,FUTURE_BILLING_PROCESS_FLG
 ,TRXN_SOURCE 
 ,LINE_REF_NUMBER 
 ,ORIG_LINE_REF_NUMBER 
 ,OA_LINE_REF_NUMBER 
 ,OA_ORIG_LINE_REF_NUMBER 
 ,ORDER_NUMBER
 ,PARTNER_HARDWARE_REV_FLG /*ADDED AS PART OF ATHENA Q2FY21*/ 
 , TIME_BOUND_CREDIT /* Added for PA credit Q2FY21 DEC*/
 , FLEXUP_FLAG /* Added as part of Athena Q1FY22 Athena sep release */
 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_CG_ACCRUAL_DIST_ALL_INCR 
 
 
 UNION ALL
 
 SELECT 
   FID
  ,REF_CODE
  ,BID
  ,OPERATION_UNIT
  ,INSTANCE_NAME
  ,BDOM
  ,CURRENCY
  ,ORG_ID
  ,LEDGER_ID
  ,APPLICATION_NAME
  ,SOURCE
  ,KAFKA_TOPIC_NAME
  ,SUBSCRIPTION_CODE
  ,SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE
  ,WEB_ORDER_ID
  ,SOURCE_ORDER_LINE_ID
  ,BILLING_MODEL
  ,OFFER_TYPE
  ,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
  ,ITEM_NAME
  ,QUANTITY
   ,ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
  ,TRX_NUMBER
  ,CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
  ,CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
  ,CHARGE_TYPE
  ,AMOUNT
  ,DEAL_ID
  ,RULE_START_DATE
  ,RULE_END_DATE
  ,ORIGINAL_UNIQUE_ID
  ,SK_LINE_REF_NUM       /*FLEXI SCOPE*/
  ,SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT    /*FLEXI SCOPE*/
  ,OA_FLAG
  ,SEQUENCE_ID
  ,GL_DATE
 ,CAST(NULL AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS DEBIT_AMOUNT
 ,CREDIT_AMOUNT
 ,CAST(NULL AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS DEBIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT
 ,CREDIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT
 ,GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE
 ,GL_TRANSFER_DATE
 ,DEBIT_CCID AS DEBIT_CCID
 ,CREDIT_CCID AS CREDIT_CCID
 ,CREDIT_ACCOUNT_CLASS AS ACCOUNT_CLASS
,FISCAL_PERIOD_NUMBER
 ,OA_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
 ,OA_ATTRIB_ID
 ,OA_ITEM_NAME
 ,OA_QUANTITY
 ,OA_PERCENTAGE
 ,OA_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
 ,OA_CHARGE_TYPE
 ,OA_RULE_START_DATE
 ,OA_RULE_END_DATE
 ,OA_ORIGINAL_UNIQUE_ID
 ,OA_UNIQUE_ID
 ,OA_SEQUENCE_ID
 ,'CREDIT' AS DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE
 ,FUTURE_BILLING_PROCESS_FLG
 ,TRXN_SOURCE 
 ,LINE_REF_NUMBER 
 ,ORIG_LINE_REF_NUMBER 
 ,OA_LINE_REF_NUMBER 
 ,OA_ORIG_LINE_REF_NUMBER 
 ,ORDER_NUMBER
 ,PARTNER_HARDWARE_REV_FLG /*ADDED AS PART OF ATHENA Q2FY21*/ 
 , TIME_BOUND_CREDIT /* Added for PA credit Q2FY21 DEC*/
 , FLEXUP_RESV_TRANS_FLG  /* Added as part of Athena Q1FY22 Athena sep release */
 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_CG_ACCRUAL_DIST_ALL_INCR

SELECT	
	 ST.FID,
	            ST.REF_CODE,
	            ST.BID,
	            ST.OPERATION_UNIT,
	            ST.INSTANCE_NAME,
	            ST.BDOM,
	            ST.CURRENCY,
	            ST.ORG_ID,
	            ST.LEDGER_ID,
	            ST.APPLICATION_NAME,
	            ST.SOURCE,
	            ST.KAFKA_TOPIC_NAME,
	            ST.SUBSCRIPTION_CODE,
	            ST.SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE,
	            ST.WEB_ORDER_ID,
	            ST.SOURCE_ORDER_LINE_ID,
	            ST.BILLING_MODEL,
	            ST.OFFER_TYPE,
	            ST.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
	            ST.ITEM_NAME,
	            ST.QUANTITY,
	            ST.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
	            ST.TRX_NUMBER,
	            ST.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
	            ST.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
	            ST.CHARGE_TYPE,
	            ST.AMOUNT,
	            ST.DEAL_ID,
	            ST.RULE_START_DATE,
	            ST.RULE_END_DATE,
	            ST.ORIGINAL_UNIQUE_ID,
	            ST.SK_LINE_REF_NUM,
	            ST.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,
	            ST.OA_FLAG,
	            ST.SEQUENCE_ID,
	            ST.GL_DATE,
	            ST.DEBIT_AMOUNT,
	            ST.CREDIT_AMOUNT,
	            ST.DEBIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT,
	            ST.CREDIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT,
	            ST.GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE,
	            ST.GL_TRANSFER_DATE,
	            ST.DEBIT_CCID,
	            ST.CREDIT_CCID,
	            ST.ACCOUNT_CLASS,
	            ST.FISCAL_PERIOD_NUMBER,
	            ST.OA_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
	            ST.OA_ATTRIB_ID,
	            ST.OA_ITEM_NAME,
	            ST.OA_QUANTITY,
	            ST.OA_PERCENTAGE,
	            ST.OA_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
	            ST.OA_CHARGE_TYPE,
	            ST.OA_RULE_START_DATE,
	            ST.OA_RULE_END_DATE,
	            ST.OA_ORIGINAL_UNIQUE_ID,
	            ST.OA_UNIQUE_ID,
	            ST.OA_SEQUENCE_ID,
	            ST.DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE,
	            ST.FUTURE_BILLING_PROCESS_FLG,
	            'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE,
	            ST.TRXN_SOURCE,
	            ST.LINE_REF_NUMBER,
	            ST.ORIG_LINE_REF_NUMBER,
	            ST.OA_LINE_REF_NUMBER,
	            ST.OA_ORIG_LINE_REF_NUMBER,
	            ST.ORDER_NUMBER,
	            ST.PARTNER_HARDWARE_REV_FLG,
	            ST.TIME_BOUND_CREDIT,
	            ST.FLEXUP_FLAG
	            FROM	$$STGDB.WI_CG_ACCRUAL_DIST_ALL ST
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP      
		ON NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT=  ST.OA_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP_BUNDLE      
		ON NP_BUNDLE.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT=  ST.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL 
		ON NSOL.BK_LINE_REF_NUM = CAST (ST.ORIGINAL_UNIQUE_ID AS VARCHAR(30)) 
	  
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATIL 
		ON NATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT   = ST.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
	 AND NATIL.SS_CODE='CG'
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT 
		ON SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = ST.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 
	 AND SAT.SS_CODE='CG'
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT 
		ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY=SAT.AR_TRX_KEY
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB 
		ON (NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = ST.LEDGER_ID  
		AND NSOB.SS_CODE ='CG')
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC   
		ON (ST.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT )
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA_DEBIT   
		ON (ENGLA_DEBIT.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = ST.DEBIT_CCID 
		AND ENGLA_DEBIT.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA_CREDIT   
		ON (ENGLA_CREDIT.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = ST.CREDIT_CCID 
		AND ENGLA_CREDIT.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
	            WHERE	(
	 ( ST.OA_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NOT NULL 
		AND NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT IS NULL)
	 OR NP_BUNDLE.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT IS NULL 
	 OR NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT IS NULL
	 OR EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT IS NULL
	 OR ENGLA_DEBIT.CODE_COMBINATION_ID IS NULL 
	 OR ENGLA_CREDIT.CODE_COMBINATION_ID IS NULL 
	 OR NSOL.BK_LINE_REF_NUM IS NULL
	 OR NATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT IS NULL 
	 OR NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT  IS NULL
	 )  
	 
	 UNION ALL
	     SELECT	
	 ST.FID,
	            ST.REF_CODE,
	            ST.BID,
	            ST.OPERATION_UNIT,
	            ST.INSTANCE_NAME,
	            ST.BDOM,
	            ST.CURRENCY,
	            ST.ORG_ID,
	            ST.LEDGER_ID,
	            ST.APPLICATION_NAME,
	            ST.SOURCE,
	            ST.KAFKA_TOPIC_NAME,
	            ST.SUBSCRIPTION_CODE,
	            ST.SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE,
	            ST.WEB_ORDER_ID,
	            ST.SOURCE_ORDER_LINE_ID,
	            ST.BILLING_MODEL,
	            ST.OFFER_TYPE,
	            ST.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
	            ST.ITEM_NAME,
	            ST.QUANTITY,
	            ST.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
	            ST.TRX_NUMBER,
	            ST.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
	            ST.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
	            ST.CHARGE_TYPE,
	            ST.AMOUNT,
	            ST.DEAL_ID,
	            ST.RULE_START_DATE,
	            ST.RULE_END_DATE,
	            ST.ORIGINAL_UNIQUE_ID,
	            ST.SK_LINE_REF_NUM,
	            ST.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,
	            ST.OA_FLAG,
	            ST.SEQUENCE_ID,
	            ST.GL_DATE,
	            ST.DEBIT_AMOUNT,
	            ST.CREDIT_AMOUNT,
	            ST.DEBIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT,
	            ST.CREDIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT,
	            ST.GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE,
	            ST.GL_TRANSFER_DATE,
	            ST.DEBIT_CCID,
	            ST.CREDIT_CCID,
	            ST.ACCOUNT_CLASS,
	            ST.FISCAL_PERIOD_NUMBER,
	            ST.OA_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
	            ST.OA_ATTRIB_ID,
	            ST.OA_ITEM_NAME,
	            ST.OA_QUANTITY,
	            ST.OA_PERCENTAGE,
	            ST.OA_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
	            ST.OA_CHARGE_TYPE,
	            ST.OA_RULE_START_DATE,
	            ST.OA_RULE_END_DATE,
	            ST.OA_ORIGINAL_UNIQUE_ID,
	            ST.OA_UNIQUE_ID,
	            ST.OA_SEQUENCE_ID,
	            ST.DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE,
	            ST.FUTURE_BILLING_PROCESS_FLG,
	            'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE,
	            ST.TRXN_SOURCE,
	            ST.LINE_REF_NUMBER,
	            ST.ORIG_LINE_REF_NUMBER,
	            ST.OA_LINE_REF_NUMBER,
	            ST.OA_ORIG_LINE_REF_NUMBER,
	            ST.ORDER_NUMBER,
	            ST.PARTNER_HARDWARE_REV_FLG,
	            ST.TIME_BOUND_CREDIT,
	            ST.FLEXUP_FLAG
	            FROM	$$STGDB.WI_CG_ACCRUAL_DIST_ALL ST
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP      
		ON NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT=  ST.OA_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP_BUNDLE      
		ON NP_BUNDLE.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT=  ST.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
	 ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = ST.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT 
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATIL 
		ON NATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT   = ST.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
	 AND NATIL.SS_CODE='CG'
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT 
		ON SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = ST.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 
	 AND SAT.SS_CODE='CG'
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT 
		ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY=SAT.AR_TRX_KEY
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB 
		ON (NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = ST.LEDGER_ID  
		AND NSOB.SS_CODE ='CG')
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC   
		ON (ST.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT )
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA_DEBIT   
		ON (ENGLA_DEBIT.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = ST.DEBIT_CCID 
		AND ENGLA_DEBIT.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA_CREDIT   
		ON (ENGLA_CREDIT.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = ST.CREDIT_CCID 
		AND ENGLA_CREDIT.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
	            WHERE	(
	 ( ST.OA_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NOT NULL 
		AND NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT IS NULL)
	 OR NP_BUNDLE.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT IS NULL 
	 OR NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT IS NULL
	 OR EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT IS NULL
	 OR ENGLA_DEBIT.CODE_COMBINATION_ID IS NULL 
	 OR ENGLA_CREDIT.CODE_COMBINATION_ID IS NULL 
	 OR NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT IS NULL 
	 OR NATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT IS NULL 
	 OR NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT  IS NULL
	 )
